content:
**[The Source Files](https://drive.google.com/drive/u/1/folders/1sOyopUbBhgpdZbew2WezbOrwXlmK0OoC)**
The Source Sheet include: 
1) a column of MultiLanguage Key to identify each text string;
2) a column of Source Text (Chinese). This column cannot be changed.
3) a column of Translation Text: Contributors can edit this column.

The recommended way of translating/proofreading is to make a copy of the source sheet, modify the "Translation" column (please don't modify any other columns), then download it to submit change to the GitHub Directory.
Please note that you may not find the entirety of the source text files here, as we cannot leak future content. 
If you want to work on a certain part of content, but cannot find the corresponding source file, please notify us by opening an Issue in <#1404748432328888401> !

**[Language Testing Sheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1WQpzrkFNluWgAkKHQTLB1wbmJQFHp-HsYZ_Hm9_e_Vc/edit?usp=drive_link)**
Submit translation issues you find in game in this sheet!
For UI issues, please try to provide a full screenshot.

**[Term Bases & Style Guide](https://drive.google.com/drive/u/1/folders/1NVBQGdhmr6w6tx9RzpX-BDKxdQD-MX9m)
**
**Currently, only the English language has a human translated, full Term Base,** with 6,800 terms and growing.

There is also an **[IMPORTANT TERMS](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cKOGnLESM3WajWbTVEWdacvpuBfENQw1iQ9ep-ih9Mc/edit?usp=sharing)** file for ALL LANGUAGES, including: Major Character Names, Wheel of Destiny Names, and Major Gameplay Terms.
We'll upload the machine translated full term base for other languages for your reference later! Thank you for your patience.

To **add a new term entry**, simply create a new row on top. You can choose to provide your name in the CONTRIBUTOR column.
To **edit an existing term translation**, please enter your new translation in the "NEW TRANSLATION" column. 
***Please DO NOT directly edit, or delete a term!*** It may cause confusion for other volunteers.

We recommend **confirming with other volunteers** working on the same language before editing term translations!

About the **[Style Guide](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1gauwAJBvSQt8p12c39taKl4ubRzayxdccWH7VfYw3e4/edit?gid=0#gid=0)**:

Morimens uses a series of **specialized rich text tags**. 

Currently, the Style Guide mainly introduces 

**1) how to use said rich text tags
2) general punctuation and spelling rules
3) other general styling, tenses, tone of voice rules.**

The Style Guide is still a Work in Progress.

Contributors can also create individual Style Guides for each language by adding new sheets to the [Main Style Guide](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1gauwAJBvSQt8p12c39taKl4ubRzayxdccWH7VfYw3e4/edit?gid=0#gid=0) file.

embeds.title: Google Drive: Sign-in
embeds.description: Access Google Drive with a Google account (for personal use) or Google Workspace account (for business use).
